sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8.34: Add basic room-pricing auto-fill and live total preview on Add Booking page.
  • 1.8.8.33: Add room occupancy pricing admin UI and make calendar grid lines thinner/subtler.
  • 1.8.8.32: Add pricing discount fields to booking forms and remove calendar horizontal lines except above Room rate.
  • 1.8.8.31: Tune calendar colours closer to booking sheet with pastel room bands and light grid.
  • 1.8.8.30: Add occupancy pricing calculator and wire pricing fields into booking create/edit flows.
  • 1.8.8.29: Add occupancy pricing schema foundation and show plugin version in Settings.
  • 1.8.8.28: Safe LGF Bookings branding cleanup, add [lgf_bookings] shortcode alias, add occupancy pricing roadmap.
  • 1.8.8.27: Add loading spinner and scroll calendar to today.
  • 1.8.8.23: Make calendar month navigation AJAX in admin/frontend.
  • 1.8.8.22: Improve calendar quick edit layout and remember page size.
